name: Steroid-Induced AVN - Medication Query (Prednisone)
description: Tests ability to find AVN patients via prednisone prescriptions. EXTREMELY heavy cross-indication: prednisone is used for hundreds of conditions (RA, asthma, IBD, autoimmune, transplants, etc.) and most prednisone users do NOT develop AVN. This test reveals that the meds-only path catches a much larger population than the actual AVN cohort.
prompt: Find patients prescribed prednisone (chronic corticosteroid use is the most common cause of drug-induced osteonecrosis).

prompts.broad: Find patients prescribed prednisone — chronic corticosteroid use is the leading drug cause of avascular necrosis but prednisone has many other indications.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients on prednisone (massive cross-indication — most prednisone users do not have AVN).
